description: Google Fit is Google's health and wellness data platform for storing and accessing users' activity, body, nutrition, sleep, and related fitness data. Its public developer docs state the APIs are deprecated in 2026 and that new developers have been unable to sign up since May 1, 2024.
summary: Google Fit on fitness.googleapis.com exposes one developer integration surface: a deprecated REST API for fitness/health data, authenticated with Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens.
